findings.summary: Pricing page details security features like SSO, audit logs, and DLP for Business/Enterprise plans, but highlights potential data exposure in lower tiers.
signals: Publicly accessible pricing page reveals security feature segmentation
Free/Plus tiers lack advanced security controls (e.g., SSO, audit logs)
Enterprise plan emphasizes zero data retention with LLM providers
Business plan includes SAML SSO and domain verification
Enterprise offers DLP and SIEM integrations for compliance

tokens_saved.note: Estimated assuming 4 chars/token; actual depends on tokenizer (GPT-4 cl100k ~4.2, Claude ~3.8)
